CREATE TABLE h3_test (index UInt64, resolution UInt8);
CREATE TABLE h3_resolutions (resolution UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
WITH (SELECT index FROM h3_test WHERE resolution = 6) AS idx SELECT h3ToChildren(idx, 6) AS children;
SELECT h3ToChildren(a.index, b.resolution) FROM h3_test AS a JOIN h3_resolutions AS b ON b.resolution = 6;
SELECT h3ToChildren(TOUInt64('599405990164561919'), CAST(6 AS UInt8)) AS children;
WITH (SELECT index FROM h3_test LIMIT 1) AS idx SELECT h3ToChildren(idx, 6) AS single_child;
SELECT h3ToChildren(index, 6) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT index FROM h3_test) AS unique_indexes;
CREATE TABLE h3_complex AS SELECT index, resolution FROM h3_test WHERE resolution BETWEEN 0 AND 15;
SELECT h3ToChildren(index, resolution) FROM h3_complex WHERE resolution IN (1, 2, 3);
SELECT h3ToChildren(123456789012345678, 10) AS children_1, h3ToChildren(987654321098765432, 5) AS children_2;
